prediction.reasoning: For a 6-day stock price prediction, I used a random walk model with drift based on typical Microsoft stock volatility (~25% annual, ~1.6% daily). The point estimate assumes no significant drift over 6 days. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with increasing width for higher confidence levels, accounting for the uncertainty that grows with the prediction horizon.
